method_summary: AIBuildAI-2 is a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving hierarchical knowledge system that dynamically loads relevant context for AI model building tasks.
key_innovation: An external knowledge system that continuously evolves by distilling the agent's own experience into structured takeaways.
limitations_stated: Performance of existing agents is limited by static, outdated, and sparse parametric knowledge in underlying LLMs
title: AIBuildAI-2: Scalable Agentic AI Research and Engineering
